steps.name: Wire complete() to persist and save carryover
steps.criteria: tripService.complete() marks trip status as completed, persists to storage, saves unbought items as carryover via TripStorage.saveCarryover; returns CompleteTripResult
steps.scenario_name: complete() persists trip and saves carryover items

steps.name: Start new trip with carryover from storage
steps.criteria: TripStorage.loadCarryover retrieves saved carryover items; trip.start() receives them and they appear in getItems() with source 'carryover'; carryover cleared from storage after loading
steps.scenario_name: new trip loads carryover from completed trip

steps.name: Full trip cycle: complete then start new with carryover
steps.criteria: End-to-end: start trip with staples, check some off, complete trip, start new trip — new trip has staples plus carryover (unbought items from previous); carryover items have source 'carryover'

steps.name: StoreView handleFinishTrip calls complete()
steps.criteria: handleFinishTrip in StoreView calls tripService.complete() after computing summary; trip result still shown in TripSummaryView
steps.scenario_name: finish trip button triggers domain completion

steps.name: App init detects completed trip and starts new with carryover
steps.criteria: On app initialization, if stored trip has status 'completed', load carryover, start fresh trip with staples + carryover, clear carryover from storage
steps.scenario_name: app init starts new trip with carryover from completed trip
